title: polypogon hissaricus
intro: Polypogon hissaricus, also known as Persian knawel, is a species of flowering plant in the family Poaceae. It is a small annual grass with a narrow leaf and a small yellow flower, native to the Middle East and Central Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can be used to treat wounds and skin conditions. Polypogon hissaricus can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture to benefit from its health properties, such as reducing inflammation and promoting healing.
